_comment: Production-like conversion config for docling-serve. Mirrors what docling-proxy injects for a text-PDF VLM route (main.py build_picture_description_api). Fields that come from environment (URL, API key) are placeholders — run.py overrides them before each request.
notes: concurrency=8 matches the value proxy injects per request (DEFAULT_VLM_CONCURRENCY in docling-proxy/main.py).

picture_description_custom_config is intentionally NOT used here — proxy always switches to picture_description_api because custom_config does not respect concurrency (known bug #4 in TASK_01 report).
image_export_mode=placeholder avoids the Pillow 'tile cannot extend outside image' crash on VLM pipeline (known bug #2 in TASK_01 report).

For this baseline we use 'standard' pipeline + picture_description_api — that is what the proxy uses for text PDFs. VLM full-page pipeline is a separate route handled by build_vlm_pipeline_model_api, not measured in TASK_02 baseline.
